loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing THD and harmonic values — crest factor, flicker, and trend data are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage and current THD trends — harmonic order (5th/7th) and scalar stats (max/min/avg) are not measured by this asset.
